score_components.formula_applied: Not applicable — instructional video, not performance

confidence_rationale: Video classification is definitive. Frames show clear instructional/educational content with sequential technique demonstration, static equipment displays, and narrative-style instruction. No actual trainee performance data to score.
cannot_determine: Actual completion time — this is instructional demonstration, not a performance
Penalties — no trainee performance to evaluate
Loop placement accuracy — demonstration only, not assessment
technique_summary: This is an instructional/educational video demonstrating proper FLS Endoloop technique. The video sequentially shows equipment setup, loop deployment, proper positioning at the marked line, cinching with the knot pusher, and final secured completion. Demonstrates expert-level technique without any errors or deviations.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper ligating loop orientation and opening
Advancing loop over foam appendage toward marked target line
Centering the pre-tied knot at the marked slit
Using knot pusher mechanism to cinch and secure
Ensuring tight, complete closure at target location
Proper positioning of tail ends after completion
verbal_cues: Video shows sequential step-by-step demonstration without apparent narration
common_errors_addressed: Misalignment of loop (video demonstrates correct centering at mark)
Incomplete cinching (video shows proper tightening with pusher)

video_purpose: Educational demonstration of proper FLS Endoloop task technique for trainer reference or student instruction
